info.name: WebPeel API
info.description:
WebPeel — high-performance web scraping and data extraction API. Turn any website into clean, structured content (markdown, text, JSON, screenshots) with built-in bot detection bypass, JavaScript rendering, and smart token budgeting.

Get a free API key at https://app.webpeel.dev

Full docs: https://webpeel.dev/docs/api-reference

item.name: Fetch
item.description: Fetch any URL and return clean, structured content.

query.description: URL to fetch (required)
Output format: markdown, text, html
Use headless browser for JS-heavy sites
Wait ms after page load (with render=true)
Smart token budget — distill to N tokens
Include image URLs and alt text
Strip boilerplate, return main content only
Reader mode — extract main article only
Stealth mode for bot detection bypass
Also capture a screenshot (base64 PNG)
Ask a question about the content (BM25 scoring)
Bypass cache, force fresh fetch
ISO country code for geo-targeted content
Hard truncation token limit

request.description: Fetch any URL and return clean content in markdown, text, or HTML format. Results are cached for 5 minutes by default.

response.name: Successful fetch

request.description: POST variant of /v1/fetch. Accepts a JSON body with all the same options plus extract, question, actions, etc.

response.name: Successful fetch (POST)

item.name: Search
item.description: Search the web and get structured results.

query.description: Search query (required)
Number of results (1-10, default 5)
Data sources: web, news, images (comma-separated)
Provider: auto, duckduckgo, brave, stealth
Fetch full content for each result
Filter: github, pdf, docs, blog, news, video, social
Time filter: qdr:d (day), qdr:w (week)
ISO country code for geo results

request.description: Search the web and return structured results with titles, URLs, and snippets. Cached 15 minutes.

response.name: Search results

request.description: Deep search with content fetching and analysis. Returns enriched results with full page content.

response.name: Smart search results

request.description: Capture a screenshot of any URL. Returns a base64-encoded data URL image. Supports full-page capture, custom viewport, stealth mode, and page actions.

item.name: Ask
item.description: LLM-free web Q&A using BM25 relevance scoring.

query.value: What is the price of Stripe?
query.description: Question to answer (required)
Number of web sources to fetch (1-5, default 3)

request.description: Search the web and answer a question using BM25 relevance scoring. No LLM API key required — 100% deterministic, always fast.

response.name: Question answered

request.description: POST variant. Optionally target a specific URL instead of searching the web.

response.name: Targeted answer

request.description: ⚠️ Deprecated — will be removed on 2026-06-01. Use POST /v1/ask instead (LLM-free, faster, no BYOK needed).

response.name: Answer generated

item.name: Agent
item.description: AI-powered web agent that can browse, extract, and complete tasks.

request.description: Run an AI-powered web agent that can navigate pages, click elements, fill forms, and extract structured data. Requires an LLM API key (BYOK).

response.name: Agent completed

item.name: Usage
item.description: Check your API usage and quota.

request.description: Get your current week's API usage, limits, burst usage, and extra usage balance.

item.name: Extract
item.description: Extract structured data from web pages using schemas.

request.description: Extract structured JSON data from any web page using a JSON Schema definition. Uses LLM or pattern matching depending on complexity.

response.name: Extracted data

request.description: Automatically extract common fields (product info, contact details, etc.) without providing a schema.

response.name: Auto-extracted data

item.name: Crawl
item.description: Crawl entire websites and extract content from multiple pages.

request.description: Start a crawl job. Returns a job ID to poll for results.
Check the status of a crawl job and retrieve results.

response.name: Crawl complete

item.name: Map
item.description: Discover all pages on a website (sitemap).

query.description: Base URL to map
Max URLs to discover

request.description: Discover all pages on a website by parsing sitemaps, robots.txt, and common URL patterns.
Create a new account and get an API key. No authentication required.

response.name: Registration successful

request.description: Log in and receive a JWT access token and refresh token.
